arch_overview.label: Architecture Overview
questions: Does this architectural flow directly support the 'User Actions & Flows' defined in the Concept?
Are the responsibilities between frontend and backend clearly delineated?
Does this high-level structure match the technologies chosen in the Tech Stack?

data_models.label: Data Models & State
questions: Are the database relationships (e.g., one-to-many) correctly mapped to support the Key Features?
Is the 'Source of Truth' and state management strategy clearly defined?
Are there any missing data entities that would be required to fulfill the User Goal?

component_breakdown.label: Component Breakdown
questions: Are the UI components modular and reusable where appropriate?
Does the breakdown cover all visual states (Loading, Error, Empty) required by the concept?
Are the core backend services logically separated to handle the specified business logic?
